# Claude Code Skills

Skills and instructions for using [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code) (by Anthropic) with the SHAFT test automation framework.

## About Claude Code

Claude Code is Anthropic's agentic coding tool that operates directly in your terminal, understanding your codebase and executing tasks through natural language commands.

## Available Skills

_No skills have been added yet. Contributions are welcome!_

## Notes

- Claude Code can navigate and understand the SHAFT repository structure autonomously
- When using Claude Code with SHAFT, it can leverage the existing `.github/copilot-instructions.md` for framework-specific context
- Claude Code excels at multi-step code changes, refactoring, and test generation
